$comment: SCHEMA CHEAT-SHEET — this first block is documentation only; the site ignores it. To add a deal, copy a real deal below, paste it after this block, and edit the values. See content/DEALS_README.md for step-by-step instructions. BREAKAWAY: deals board — remove at platform launch.

$fields.id: unique-url-slug, lowercase with hyphens, usually the street address (becomes zonadesert.com/deals/<id>)
$fields.address: street address, e.g. 4123 Three Mile Dr
$fields.price: asking price in dollars, plain number, no commas or $
$fields.photos: list of image paths — either /deals/<id>/1.jpg (uploaded to public/deals/<id>/) or full https:// URLs
$fields.closeBy: OPTIONAL — close-by date as YYYY-MM-DD, shown as urgency on available deals
$fields.featured: OPTIONAL — true to pin the deal to the front of the board

description: Solid brick bungalow in East English Village, one of Detroit's steadiest rental pockets. Roof and furnace are newer; the rehab is cosmetic — paint, floors, kitchen refresh. Rents in this corridor support $1,600+ with strong tenant demand year round.
highlights: Brick construction, newer roof and furnace
Cosmetic rehab only — no structural work
East English Village rental comps at $1,600–$1,750/mo

description: Warrendale three-bed priced under comps for a fast close. Full interior rehab, but the bones are right — dry basement, straight roofline, original hardwoods under carpet. Section 8 demand in this zip keeps vacancy near zero.

Four-bed colonial that moved in under a week. Buyer is running a full gut to the studs with an ARV north of $160k on recent comps. Kept here as a track-record example of the kind of inventory that comes through this board.
highlights: Four beds — rare for the block
ARV backed by two active flips on the street
